iran_nuke.notes: Day 17 01:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IDF claims 80% of Iran's air defense destroyed — this could paradoxically push Iran toward nuclear hedging if regime survival feels threatened, but no enrichment escalation yet. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). NEW: Drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai International Airport — fire ongoing, no injuries (Guardian/Sky). IDF claims 80% of Iran's air defense destroyed, 70% of ballistic missile launchers 'out of operational use' (Sky/IDF). Trump demands 'about 7' countries join Hormuz policing coalition (AP). Trump again criticizes UK for not joining strikes. IDF says it will keep fighting 'until threats removed.' Tehran strikes continue overnight. Macron demands Pezeshkian 'immediately put an end' to Gulf attacks. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 17 02:00 — IMMINENT 92 (FALLING). MAJOR SHIFT: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks 'in the coming days' aimed at durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament (Reuters/Haaretz). Replaces previous rejection signal. Ground ops continue but diplomatic track now open. 26+ medics killed, 210+ Hezbollah rockets since Mar 2. IDF still says 'thousands of targets' remain in Iran. 92 (falling).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Trump NATO Hormuz threat + UK criticism could further strain NATO cohesion. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks in Paris continue. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China's Hormuz inaction. China faces pressure to join Hormuz coalition (90% of its oil transits Hormuz). 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week). No new provocations in last 8h. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). Russia fired 68 missiles + 430 drones + 1,530 KABs in past week. 6 killed Saturday in Kyiv region strikes. Zaporizhzhia residential hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion. Ukraine deep strikes on Iskander in Crimea continue. UK considering interceptor drones to ME, diverting from Ukraine aid. 88 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE). 75+ civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes, 115,000 displaced (NYT). No ceasefire. Fighting shows no letup (Guardian/AP). Taliban retaliates in Kandahar + Helmand. Qatar-brokered Oct ceasefire fully collapsed. 99 (capped, stable).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
MIXED SIGNALS (Day 17 02:00):
- ISRAEL-LEBANON: FIRST CONCRETE DE-ESCALATION. Reuters/Haaretz report Israel-Lebanon talks expected 'in coming days' for ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament. Two Israeli officials confirmed. This is the first significant off-ramp since war resumed Mar 2. Score drops 100->92.
- IRAN: HARDENING. FM Araghchi tells CBS 'never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation, ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Trump simultaneously says US 'not ready' for deal. Both sides explicitly rejecting diplomacy. Iran says 'ready for long war.'
- NET: Lebanon front showing first light. Iran front darkening. The ceasefire talks could relieve pressure on Lebanon front but may not affect Iran trajectory. Global score drops slightly (86->85) due to Lebanon signal.
changed_signals.synagogue_note: US domestic: Michigan synagogue attack suspect's brother confirmed by IDF as Hezbollah commander killed in Israeli strike. IDF claims operational link. Domestic blowback from ME conflict intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks 'in coming days' for durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament
latest_news.text: Two Israeli officials confirm Israel-Lebanon talks expected 'in the coming days' aimed at securing durable ceasefire that would see Hezbollah disarmed. Timing and terms not yet agreed. First concrete ceasefire signal since war resumed Mar 2. Ground ops continue meanwhile.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM: 'We never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war'
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi on CBS Face the Nation: 'We have never asked for a ceasefire, and we have never asked even for negotiation. We are ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Trump says Iran wants a deal but US 'not ready.' Hardening rhetoric on both sides.

latest_news.headline: IDF says it still has 'thousands of targets' to hit in Iran
latest_news.text: IDF briefing: 'thousands of targets' remain in Iran. 80% of air defense destroyed, 70% of ballistic missile launchers 'out of operational use.' Progressing to military industries and 'entire production chain.' No withdrawal timeline. Calls it 'prolonged but necessary.'

latest_news.headline: Trump demands 'about 7' countries join coalition to police Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump demands approximately 7 countries join US-led coalition to reopen and police Strait of Hormuz. Expands pressure beyond NATO to regional states. Most specific coalition demand yet. IRGC responds: 'Let him send his ships.'

latest_news.headline: Trump says US 'not ready' to seek deal to end war with Iran
latest_news.text: Trump says US is 'not ready' to pursue a deal with Iran, contradicting his own claim that Iran wants talks. No diplomatic off-ramp visible.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai International Airport — fire ongoing
latest_news.text: Dubai civil defence fighting fire at fuel tank near DXB caused by drone incident. No injuries. Multiple drone hits on Dubai in recent weeks denting safe-haven image.

latest_news.headline: Pakistani airstrikes kill 75+ civilians in Afghanistan, 115,000 displaced
latest_news.text: Pakistani airstrikes have killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan. Both sides vowing escalation. No ceasefire in sight.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine in single day
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 68 missiles and about 430 drones Saturday. 6 killed in Kyiv region. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 85% (Day 17 02:00). DAY 17 CONTINUES: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): FM Araghchi tells CBS 'we never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war.' Trump says US 'not ready' for deal. IDF has 'thousands of targets' remaining. Dubai airport fuel tank hit. Trump demands 7-country Hormuz coalition. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 92 (FALLING): MAJOR SHIFT — Israel-Lebanon talks expected 'in coming days' for ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament (Reuters/Haaretz). First concrete de-escalation signal since Mar 2. Ground ops continue. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 93 (RISING): 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. UK considering diverting interceptor drones to ME, reducing Ukraine aid. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE): 75+ civilians killed, 115K displaced. No ceasefire. (5) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55. (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks are the first significant de-escalation signal in 2+ weeks. If talks materialize, Israel-Lebanon score could drop sharply. However, Iran front remains fully hot with no diplomatic track. Trump and Araghchi's mutual denial of interest in talks hardening the Iran track even as Lebanon shows a potential off-ramp.
